Finding Neverland (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $51,676,606Details
International Box Office $63,359,502
Worldwide Box Office $115,036,108
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$220,524 (0.4% of total gross)
Legs:11.07 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:44.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:8 opening theaters/1,411 max. theaters, 10.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $95,319,954

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 12th, 2004 (Limited) by Miramax
International Releases: December 31st, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: March 22nd, 2005 by Miramax Video
MPA Rating: PG for mild thematic elements and brief language
Running Time: 106 minutes
Franchise: Peter Pan
Award nomination: 2005 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Social setting: Supernatural
Subgenre: Historical Drama
Source:Based on Play
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Film Colony
Production Countries: United States, United Kingdom
Languages: English
